title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS326-4C+20G+2Q+RM
description: The optical-metallic Cloud Router Switch CRS326-4C+20G+2Q+RM with installation in a 19" rack is an ideal solution for building a 2.5 Gbps LAN network . The switch contains 20x 100/1000/2500 Mbps ethernet, 4x combo 2.5 Gbps (LAN) / 10 Gbps (SFP+), 2x QSFP+ with a speed of 40 Gbps/port, 1x ethernet management port and 1x console RJ45 port. The device can be powered by two integrated power supplies , thus offering redundant power . The maximum consumption of the device is 70 W with connected SFP… Thanks to the Marvel switch chip, the device can easily use the potential of the RouterOS operating system - VLANs, Jumbo frames, ACL rules, port aggregation and much more
